phase_title: Replace TypeScript Next config for production runtime
activation_note: Human-approved successor phase for the Web Next.js configuration hotfix. It is limited to the two explicitly allowlisted Web configuration files and must stop after Prepare without publishing.

last_result.validation_summary: Web typecheck passed; Web production build passed; workspace typecheck passed; workspace production build passed; git diff --check passed; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --offline hydrated existing cached dependencies without changing dependency manifests or lockfiles; no migration, database mutation, network access, deployment, or production operation occurred.
